sys_email_layout.advanced_layout:
${notification:body}
. .
${mail_script:x_dice_digicertone.footerContacts}

Copyright© 2023 DigiCert, Inc. All rights reserved. DigiCert and its logo are registered

trademarks of DigiCert, Inc. Other names may be trademarks of their respective owners.
sys_email_layout.description: Default layout for all DigiCert notification emails
sys_email_layout.layout:
<div class="body" style="width: 100%;">
  <table role="presentation" border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="body-container" style="border-collapse: separate; mso-table-lspace: 0pt; mso-table-rspace: 0pt; width: 100%;" width="100%">
    <tr>
      <td style="font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; vertical-align: top;" valign="top"> </td>
      <td class="container" style="font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; vertical-align: top; display: block; max-width: 650px; padding: 0px; width: 650px; Margin: 0 auto;" width="650" valign="top">
        <div class="header" style="background-color: #fff; padding: 40px 0;">
          <table role="presentation" border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: separate; mso-table-lspace: 0pt; mso-table-rspace: 0pt; width: 100%;" width="100%">
            <tr>
              <td class="align-center" style="font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; vertical-align: top; text-align: center;" valign="top" align="center">
                <a href="https://www.digicert.com/" style="color: #0174C3; text-decoration: none;">
                  <img src="https://www.digicert.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/10/DigiCert-Logo.png" height="40" alt="DigiCert" style="border: none; -ms-interpolation-mode: bicubic; max-width: 100%;" />
                </a>
              </td>
            </tr>
          </table>
        </div>
        <div class="content" style="box-sizing: border-box; display: block; Margin: 0 auto; max-width: 650px;">
          <!-- START CENTERED WHITE CONTAINER -->
          <table role="presentation" class="main" style="border-collapse: separate; mso-table-lspace: 0pt; mso-table-rspace: 0pt; background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 3px; width: 100%;" width="100%">
            <!-- START MAIN CONTENT AREA -->
            <tr>
              <td class="wrapper" style="font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; vertical-align: top; box-sizing: border-box; padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px; padding-bottom: 40px;" valign="top">
                  
                   
                
                ${notification:body}
                
                
                
              </td>
            </tr>
          <!-- END MAIN CONTENT AREA -->
          </table>
          <!-- START FOOTER -->
          <div class="footer" style="background-color: #F2F1F2; clear: both; padding-top: 30px; padding-bottom: 30px; text-align: center; width: 100%;">
                <div class="content-block-social-media" style="margin-bottom: 30px;">
                  <table role="presentation" border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: separate; mso-table-lspace: 0pt; mso-table-rspace: 0pt; width: 100%;" width="100%">
                    <tr>
                      <td width="33%" align="center" valign="top" style="vertical-align: top; text-align: center; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 2px; color: #ffffff;">.</td>
                      <td class="content-block" style="vertical-align: top; color: #666666; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; text-align: center;" valign="top" align="center">
                        <a href="https://www.facebook.com/DigiCert/" style="text-decoration: none; color: #666666; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; text-align: center;">
                          <img style="border: none; -ms-interpolation-mode: bicubic; max-width: 100%; align: baseline;" src="Facebook.pngx" width="10" height="18" />
                        </a>
                      </td>
                      <td class="content-block" style="vertical-align: top; color: #666666; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; text-align: center;" valign="top" align="center">
                        <a href="https://www.youtube.com/user/DigiCertSSL" style="text-decoration: none; color: #666666; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; text-align: center;">
                          <img style="border: none; -ms-interpolation-mode: bicubic; max-width: 100%; align: baseline;" src="YouTube.pngx" width="26" height="18" />
                        </a>
                      </td>
                      <td class="content-block" style="vertical-align: top; color: #666666; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; text-align: center;" valign="top" align="center">
                        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/digicert-inc-/" style="text-decoration: none; color: #666666; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; text-align: center;">
                          <img style="border: none; -ms-interpolation-mode: bicubic; max-width: 100%; align: baseline;" src="LinkendIn.pngx" width="18" height="18" />
                        </a>
                      </td>
                      <td class="content-block" style="vertical-align: top; color: #666666; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; text-align: center;" valign="top" align="center">
                        <a href="https://twitter.com/digicert" style="text-decoration: none; color: #666666; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; text-align: center;">
                          <img style="border: none; -ms-interpolation-mode: bicubic; max-width: 100%; align: baseline;" src="Twitter.pngx" width="22" height="18" />
                        </a>
                      </td>
                      <td width="33%" align="center" valign="top" style="vertical-align: top; text-align: center; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 2px; color: #ffffff;">.</td>
                    </tr>
                  </table>
                </div>
                <table role="presentation" border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: separate; mso-table-lspace: 0pt; mso-table-rspace: 0pt; width: 100%;" width="100%">
                  <tr>
                    <td class="content-footer" style="vertical-align: top; color: #666666; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; text-align: center;" valign="top" align="center">
                      ${mail_script:footerContacts}
                      <p class="content-footer" style="margin: 0; margin-bottom: 5px; text-align: center; font-family: 'Roboto',sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 10px; color: #666666;">DigiCert, Inc. ©2020 All rights reserved. <a href="https://www.digicert.com/digicert-privacy-policy/" style="text-decoration: none; color: #666666; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; text-align: center;">Privacy Policy</a></p>
                      <p class="content-footer" style="margin: 0; margin-bottom: 5px; text-align: center; font-family: 'Roboto',sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 10px; color: #666666;">2801 Thanksgiving Way, Suite 500, Lehi, Utah 84043</p>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                </table>
          </div>
          <!-- END FOOTER -->
        <!-- END CENTERED WHITE CONTAINER -->
        </div>
      </td>
      <td style="font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; vertical-align: top;" valign="top"> </td>
    </tr>
  </table>
</div>

<style>
  @media only screen and (max-width: 620px) {
    table[class=body] h1 {
      font-size: 28px !important;
      margin-bottom: 10px !important;
    }
  
    table[class=body] p,
  table[class=body] ul,
  table[class=body] ol,
  table[class=body] td,
  table[class=body] span,
  table[class=body] a {
      font-size: 16px !important;
    }
  
    table[class=body] .wrapper,
  table[class=body] .article {
      padding: 10px !important;
    }
  
    table[class=body] .content {
      padding: 0 !important;
    }
  
    table[class=body] .container {
      padding: 0 !important;
      width: 100% !important;
    }
  
    table[class=body] .main {
      border-left-width: 0 !important;
      border-radius: 0 !important;
      border-right-width: 0 !important;
    }
  
    table[class=body] .btn table {
      width: 100% !important;
    }
  
    table[class=body] .btn a {
      width: 100% !important;
    }
  
    table[class=body] .img-responsive {
      height: auto !important;
      max-width: 100% !important;
      width: auto !important;
    }
  }
  @media all {
    .ExternalClass {
      width: 100%;
    }
  
    .ExternalClass,
  .ExternalClass p,
  .ExternalClass span,
  .ExternalClass font,
  .ExternalClass td,
  .ExternalClass div {
      line-height: 100%;
    }
  
    .apple-link a {
      color: inherit !important;
      font-family: inherit !important;
      font-size: inherit !important;
      font-weight: inherit !important;
      line-height: inherit !important;
      text-decoration: none !important;
    }
  
    .btn-primary table td:hover {
      background-color: #D5075D !important;
    }
  
    .btn-primary a:hover {
      background-color: #D5075D !important;
      border-color: #D5075D !important;
    }
  }
  </style>
sys_email_layout.name: DigiCert Email Layout
